Constructor.summary: Initializes an object instance with the provided values.

AddIndent.summary: Changes the IndentCount by the provided value.

AddLine.summary: Adds a text line without modification.

Item.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
Item.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

Line.summary: Adds a modified text line to the builder.
Line.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.
Line.returns: The added, potentially modified text line.

Text.summary: Adds modified text to the builder.
Text.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

EndsWithNewLine.summary: Indicates if the builder text ends with a newline.
EndsWithNewLine.returns: true if the current value ends with a newline; otherwise false.

StartWithNewLine.summary: Allow text to start with a newline.
StartWithNewLine.param: Indicates if a new line is allowed.
StartWithNewLine.returns: true if the text should start with a newline; otherwise false.

GetDelimited.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
GetDelimited.returns: The text value with the potentially added delimiter.

GetIndented.summary: Gets a new potentially indented line.
GetIndented.returns: The text value with the potentially added indent.

GetLine.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

GetText.summary: Gets potentially indented and wrapped text.
GetText.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

GetWrapped.summary: Gets added text and new wrapped line if combined line > LineLimit.

HasText.summary: Gets a value indicating if the builder has text.

IndentCharCount.summary: Gets or sets the indent character count.

IndentCount.summary: Gets or sets the indent count.

IsFirst.summary: Gets or sets the first item indicator.

WrapAtDelimiter.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if a wrap should occur at a leading delimiter.

WrapEnabled.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if line wrapping is enabled.

WrapPrefix.summary: Gets or sets the new line prefix.
